beats.activity: Wake up, shower, coffee at home while checking work Slack.
beats.reasoning: Starting the day at home in Eastlake after yesterday's grounded evening. Low energy carryover (45/100) suggests a slower morning routine to ease in.

beats.activity: Commute to work via car to Ballard office.
beats.reasoning: Standard morning commute from Eastlake to Ballard; 40 min drive accounting for early-morning traffic and residual bridge awareness from yesterday.

beats.activity: Deep work on Q3 projection dashboards and data modeling.
beats.reasoning: Anxious high-achiever focusing on analytical work during cooler morning hours; 91°F heat later will make office less appealing. Anticipating busy afternoon, front-loading concentration.

beats.activity: Grab bagel and iced coffee at nearby spot; eat at desk while reviewing Slack.
beats.reasoning: Ethan has strong bagel opinions and a routine; staying in Ballard for lunch avoids midday heat exposure and keeps momentum on work projects.

beats.activity: Afternoon meetings and light analytics support; heat peaks, office stays cool.
beats.reasoning: Staying indoors during 91°F peak heat and moderate smoke. Spontaneous but pragmatic—weather shapes the day. Anxious about air quality slightly elevated, so prefers AC.

beats.activity: Leave work early to beat traffic and catch early evening while cooler.
beats.reasoning: Spontaneous decision to duck out before rush hour; 35 min commute home. Setting up for evening leisure and possible Gas Works concert attendance.

beats.activity: Quick change, hydration break, flip through recent vinyl haul.
beats.reasoning: Vinyl collecting is a core passion; low-energy decompression before deciding on evening plans. Hydration matters given heat and smoke.

beats.activity: Walk to Gas Works Park for the free outdoor concert.
beats.reasoning: The concert starts at 6pm; walking from Eastlake to Gas Works takes ~25 min. Clear weather and cooler evening make it appealing. Values the experience, though crowds aren't his preference—but close friends or solo is fine.

beats.activity: Enjoy free outdoor concert; grab food truck dinner; people-watch.
beats.reasoning: Attending the main event of the day. Spontaneous Ethan shows up for good weather and music. Not a big-crowd person, but the open-air vibe and clear skies override that. Food truck keeps it casual.

beats.activity: Walk home through evening air, stopping at pocket park to listen for owls.
beats.reasoning: Birdwatching passion surfaces in evening wind-down. Pleasant twilight walk, solitude restored. Pocket park is on the way home—meditative closure to the day.

beats.activity: Simple dinner, glass of wine, review emails and text Marcus about weekend.
beats.reasoning: Winding down at home before sleep. Mirrors yesterday's grounded evening routine. Values connection with close friends (Marcus), low-key evening suits the day's energy arc.
7 hours 45 min of sleep, ending by 06:30 next morning. Overnight beat spans into Thursday as required.

world_event_prompt: Hot, clear Wednesday hitting 91F by mid-afternoon. Free outdoor concert at Gas Works Park from 6pm draws big crowds. Moderate air quality from distant BC wildfire smoke.
